abilities.name: Stuff 'Em In Me Bag
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.
abilities.effect: If the roll is at least double the target unit’s Health characteristic, 1 model in that unit is slain.

abilities.name: Timber!
abilities.effect: If this model is slain, before removing it from the battlefield, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield up to 3" from this model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 2" of that point. This model is then removed from the battlefield.

enhancements.name: Earth-Shaking Charge
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Phase (Army), Any Charge Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit that charged this phase to use this ability, then roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with it.
enhancements.effect: On a 3+, that enemy unit has **STRIKE-LAST** this turn.

enhancements.name: Foe-Chompers
enhancements.effect: Each time an enemy model is slain by a friendly unit’s ‘Stuff ’Em In Me Bag’ ability, **Heal (D3)** that unit.

enhancements.name: Monstrously Tough
enhancements.effect: Your general has a Health characteristic of 15 instead of 12.

enhancements.name: Lanky Git
enhancements.effect: When you make a charge roll for your general, roll 3D6 instead of 2D6.

enhancements.name: Furiously Territorial
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by your general that target an enemy unit that is contesting an objective you do not control.

enhancements.name: Extra-big Bag
enhancements.effect: When your general uses their ‘Stuff ’Em In Me Bag’ ability, you can pick 2 enemy units instead of 1 (roll for each).

battleTraits.name: Bellowing Roar
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target, then roll a dice.
battleTraits.effect: On a 2+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit this phase.

battleTraits.name: 'Grab Those Rocks and Chuck 'Em!'
battleTraits.declare: Pick your general to use this ability, then pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of them.
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s **Throwin’ Rocks** this turn.
